wiki.parent: Affiliated Managers Group, The Vanguard Group, American International Group, State Street Global Advisors, Vesa Equity Investment
wiki.extract: Macy's, Inc. is an American holding company of department stores. Upon its establishment in 1929, Federated held ownership of the regional department store chains Abraham & Straus, Lazarus, Filene's, and Shillito's. Bloomingdale's joined Federated Department Stores the next year. Throughout its early history, frequent acquisitions and divestitures saw the company operate a number of nameplates. In 1994, Federated took over Macy's, the old department store chain originally founded in 1858 by American entrepreneur Rowland Hussey Macy. Despite Federated's long history of preserving regional namep

health.s: 19 CPSC recalls (2 in past 24 months); latest hazard: fire & fire-related burn.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking in the store when she tripped and fell to the floor. The employee sustained a fractured left hip and required surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  during maintenance, cleaning, testing
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee completed maintenance on a conveyor and was reinstalling a guard when their right index finger was caught in the running motor resulting in the amputation of the fingernail and the skin underneath the nail.

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was taking pictures of and monitoring balloons in the sky during a balloon fest event. He tripped over a construction cone and fell to the concrete, resulting in a fractured hip.
Security employees were working to apprehend a shoplifter. When they engaged the shoplifter, the shoplifter shot an employee in the leg. The employee's leg was fractured and required surgery.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level less than 6 feet
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was descending a staircase from a stockroom when she missed the last step and fell to the floor, fracturing her right ankle.

topHazards.label: The tea kettles' handle can detach during use when heated, posing a risk of serious injury from burn hazard.
The elastic on the pajamas' ankles can be too tight and restrict blood circulation, posing an injury hazard.
The glass portion of the cruets can break during use, posing a laceration hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: Macy's Recalls Arch Studio Tea Kettles Due to Risk of Serious Injury from Burn Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Arch Studio-branded tea kettles. The stainless-steel kettles have a black handle and measure about 10.7 inches long, 7.59 inches wide and 8.62 inches high; and have a 1.9-quart capacity. The brand name and "HJ10525" are etched on the underside of the kettles.
hazards: The tea kettles' handle can detach during use when heated, posing a risk of serious injury from burn hazard.
injuries: The firm has received three reports of the handle detaching. No injuries have been reported.

sampleRecalls.title: Macy's Recalls Holiday Lane Infant Footed Pajamas Due to Injury Hazard; Sold Exclusively by Macy's
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves five different styles of Holiday Lane-branded infant footed pajamas. The cotton pajamas were sold in infant sizes 0-3 months, 3-6 months and 6-9 months. "Holiday Lane" is printed on the pajamas' neck label. The size and PID/Style numbers are printed on the care instruction tag located on the pajam…
hazards: The elastic on the pajamas' ankles can be too tight and restrict blood circulation, posing an injury hazard.
injuries: Macy's has received four reports of the elastic being too tight on infants' ankles, resulting in chafing, imprinting or restricting blood circulation.

sampleRecalls.title: Macy's Recalls Martha Stewart Collection Oil & Vinegar Cruets Due to Laceration Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Martha Stewart Collection Oil & Vinegar Cruet, which is a tapered clear glass vessel with a square base and a metal spout. UPC number 608356787608 is printed on the hang tag tied to the product. A clear, plastic adhesive label with the Martha Stewart logo may also be affixed near the base of t…
hazards: The glass portion of the cruets can break during use, posing a laceration hazard.
injuries: Macy's has received six reports of the glass cruets breaking, resulting in three lacerations, two of which required stitches.
products: Martha Stewart Collection Oil & Vinegar Cruets

sampleRecalls.title: Macy's Recalls Martha Stewart Whiteware Cake Knife and Server Sets Due to Laceration Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Macy's Martha Stewart Collection® Whiteware cake knife and server set. The set includes a knife and a cake server. Each is about 11 inches long. Both the knife and cake server have a white, textured ceramic handle. "Martha Stewart Collection" is embossed on the metal where the blades meet the hand…
hazards: The handles on the knife and server can break during use, posing a laceration hazard.
injuries: Macy's has received four reports of the handles on the knife and server breaking, resulting in lacerations, including cuts requiring stitches.
products: Martha Stewart Collection® Whiteware cake knife and server sets

sampleRecalls.title: Macy's Recalls Martha Stewart Stainless Steel Cookware; Injury Hazard with Frying Pans
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves the Martha Stewart Collection 10-piece stainless steel cookware sets, which include an 8-inch and a 10-inch stainless steel frying pans. The frying pans have two rivets that attach the frying pan to the handle. The rivets have stainless steel discs on top of them. Other items included in the cookw…
hazards: The metal discs that cover the frying pan's rivets can pop off and hit consumers, posing an injury hazard.
injuries: The firm has received seven reports of the metal discs popping off the frying pans, including three minor injuries. Injuries include bruises, burns and welts.
products: Martha Stewart Collection™ 10-piece Stainless Steel Cookware Set
